name: go-database
description: Database patterns for Go services: database/sql, connection management, transactions, migrations, query builders, and ORM usage (sqlc, GORM, ent). Use when: "database access", "SQL query", "connection pool", "transactions", "database migration", "sqlc", "GORM", "ent", "prepared statement", "repository pattern". Do NOT use for: in-memory data structures (use go-coding-standards), security aspects of SQL (use go-security-audit), or performance profiling of queries (use go-performance-review).
